data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. CREAM scored a one length win (16.95) latest, claiming a T3 RSTW over 300m at this track and draws the same box this time. Has the ability and looks a key chance again. 2. DRAGON TRAIN turned in a moderate performance last time when seventh at Geelong over 400m behind Big Boy Pants (24.31) in a Mix 6/7. The form out of his last race has been franked. Expected to feature in the finish. 1. JUSTIFIED JIM settled down midfield and held his position to the line when finishing 4th (23.35) at Warragul. In the mix. 6. GUARDIAN is a last-start placegetter from this box - solid claims again.","runners":[8,2,1,6],"exclusive":false}
